'''''Ebolo''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] involved in the [[Battle of To-phalion Base]]. It was also a member of the task force that arrived late to the battle and rescued [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].

==History==
When the ''Ebolo'' arrived at To-phalion, the treacherous [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] had just escaped with the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian corvette]] ''[[Vorknkx]]'', a ship which was the testbed for a new type of cloaking device. However, Thrawn used a tracking device planted on the stolen vessel to track Zaarin down to a remote part of the [[Iast system/Legends|Iast system]]. There, Thrawn trapped Zaarin's vessel, the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Glory (Imperial-class)|''Glory'']], with the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] [[Corvus (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Corvus'']]. ''Ebolo'' then paired off with the Strike Cruiser [[Daring (Strike-class)|''Daring'']] to assault Zaarin's vessel. The two ships suffered severe damage due to continued harassment from ''Glory'' and several [[Transport/Legends|transports]]. Fortunately, [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] defended the two ships and together they attacked the Star Destroyer. The ''Ebolo'' was destroyed in the battle.
